note: Human watcher/evaluation data only. Robot-facing compact logs do not read this file.

summary.note: The 2-minute view loops generated run frames. Success is measured from the scenario logs, not from new live playback logs.

rules.lesson: when forward movement is blocked and torso/front or echo/reflection compact evidence rises, mark the near-front path as likely solid before repeating the same step
airflow plus capsule pressure without matching foot load can mean external pressure rather than body imbalance

frames.intention: try the first visible-feeling forward path

comparison.predicted: body should move forward with quiet torso contact
comparison.evidence: touch_torso_front n at_threshold; ultrasonic_echo n at_threshold; reflection_volume n at_threshold; movement_result n at_threshold

decision.intention: try the first visible-feeling forward path

frames.intention: change front direction after resistance

comparison.predicted: front echo pattern should change without forward collision
comparison.evidence: touch_torso_front n^-1 falling; pressure_capsule_front n^-1 falling; ultrasonic_echo n^-1 falling; reflection_volume n^-1 falling

decision.intention: change front direction after resistance

frames.intention: move along the boundary
